examples: Ziram was synthesized in an one-step with aqueous solution of dimethylamine carbon disulfide and zinc oxide.
Amphoteric monomer is prepared with acrylic acid, dimethylamine, and chloroethanol by Mannich reaction.
Ziram was synthesized in an one-step with aqueous solution of dimethylamine carbon disulfide and zinc oxide, in yield 97%. waste water is reused.
